title: graecobolanthus intermedius
side_effects: Graecobolanthus intermedius can have side effects if used improperly, such as stomach upset, nausea, and diarrhea, which may be caused by excessive consumption of its toxic compounds. Additionally, prolonged use or misuse of the plant can lead to dizziness, headaches, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, improper use of Graecobolanthus intermedius may cause seizures, loss of consciousness, and even organ failure, making it essential to use the plant under the guidance of a medical professional. It is also crucial to note that the plant's effects can vary depending on the individual's sensitivity and the method of preparation.
